title: Run RTL simulation with the testbench
description: Compile and run the design plus self-checking testbench in a simulator and report assertion/scoreboard results.
body: Use when validating an RTL change. Actions: detect the simulator (Verilator, Icarus, ModelSim/Questa) from the project; compile the design and testbench; run the regression and inspect assertion failures and scoreboard mismatches. Report the exact command, pass/fail counts, and first failing assertion with its time. Do not declare correctness from a waveform alone. This skill exposes capability only and must not run vendor tools without runtime permission. Validation signals include a zero-mismatch scoreboard and zero assertion failures. Risk boundary: if no self-checking exists, report that the result is unverified rather than 'passing'.
